titleZh: 公司人格否认制度的理论分析
titleEn: An Analysis of the Corporate Personality Denial System under the Vision of the Company Law
abstractZh: 围绕公司人格否认制度解释学展开评析，讨论其在新修订公司法语境中的适用边界与理论基础。
abstractEn: Explains how Chinese veil piercing doctrine has evolved and how the revised regime may affect liability allocation in creditor and company-interest disputes.
